title: senecio chabertii
intro: Senecio chabertii, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio chabertii include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
